name: Hearty Beef Ragout
recipeIngredient: 3 pounds boneless beef chuck, cut into 1-inch pieces
1 8 oz package precooked sausage links, cut into 1-inch pieces
recipeInstructions:
Serves 8
Wipe the beef well. Combine 1/3 cup flour with salt and pepper. Toss the beef cubes in the flour mixture to coat thoroughly; place in Crock-Pot. Add the remaining ingredients, except the 2 tablespoons flour and water, in order listed; stir well. Cover and cook on Low for 8 to 12 hours or on High for 4 to 6 hours.
One hour before serving, turn the setting to High. Make a smooth paste of 2 tablespoons flour and water; stir into Crock-Pot, mixing well. Cover and cook until thickened.
